creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to jau from comment #8)
The previous patch was unfetchable, this is the only item I fixed. Only tier 1 platforms is considered the fully supported platforms which are currently i386 and amd64. The other architectures are nice to have, but aren't a reason to prevent an update.

If you can fix your previous patches unfetchable state, or the build depend the new source brings, this will keep the port alive.
